# AiImageGeneratorIsolated

## Summary
The full image studio, assigned as the AiImageGenerator card's isolated format. It renders a large poster stage for the current image with a hover overlay for Refine and Download, a ChatGPT-style bottom composer that continues from the latest image (or starts a fresh lane), and a focused Refine editor offering Reprompt and brush-based Paint-area (inpaint) modes. A GitLens-style version graph in the sidebar draws the `parent` lineage of `history` as a branch tree; hovering a node pops a preview with jump-to-thread and copy-prompt actions. Generation runs through `GenerateAiImageCommand` as an ember-concurrency task, so it exposes a Stop control, skeleton loading states, and blame-free inline errors. Aspect ratio is editable for new images and reprompts but locked to the source for inpaint. A linked theme (`cardInfo.theme`) is applied by the standard card theming pipeline — every rule reads semantic tokens through `var(--token, fallback)` chains, so an unthemed studio falls back to the package's studio-dark look.

## Import
```js
import { AiImageGeneratorIsolated } from '../components/generator';
```

## Template Usage
Not invoked directly — assigned as the isolated format in `ai-image-generator.gts`:
```js
AiImageGenerator.isolated = AiImageGeneratorIsolated;
```
